inspector.attribution: OpenAI Codex primary coding agent in the NodeSlide workspace

method.scope: Every one of the 38 Atlas slides and every one of the 14 public-showcase slides inspected individually at full size after overflow tests passed.
checks: chart scale, unit, and label binding
observed, pilot, illustrative, pending, and not-run state labels

findings.summary: Contribution labels are now bound directly to Plan, Tools, Repair, and Deck CI bars.
The graph clears the title and shows visible directed arrowheads, plus or minus polarity, and R1/B1 loop classes.
Only observed cohorts are plotted; scales, candidate denominators, cost, latency, and the not-run ensemble are explicit.
Dependencies now obey finish-to-start precedence and connectors sit behind task bars.
Evidence types, not-run/illustrative states, evaluated mathematics, and pending gates are no longer presented as observed success.

disposition: Visual and semantic presentation QA passed for the digest-bound Atlas and showcase. Blind audience preference remains a separate pending release gate.
